intended_rule: Lock profit when ZEC bot total return reaches the 40%-42%+ Profit Surge Protection zone or if downside protection thresholds are violated.
actual_execution: Bot was closed and automatic ZEC-to-USDT sell was selected. ZEC/USDT sell executed at 635.17 USDT for 0.209 ZEC.
account_risk_improvement: Floating-profit giveback risk was reduced and USDT cash dominance improved.
short_term_price_outcome: Not the primary correctness metric. A later ZEC rise or drop does not override rule compliance.
review_conclusion: Execution was rule-compliant and positive for account structure because it locked a high bot return during a defensive phase.
lessons_learned: Execution review should judge rule compliance, floating-profit protection, and account-risk improvement.
Profit lock decisions should not be retroactively judged only by post-closure price movement.
Actual execution evidence has priority over prior strategy-state assumptions.
next_rule_update: Mark ZEC grid as closed/profit locked. Do not reopen grid or chase spot without a new rule and fresh sync.
